hooks.command: (pip install -q openpyxl pandas >/dev/null 2>&1 &); ([ -d resources/claude-cookbooks ] || git clone -q --depth 1 https://github.com/anthropics/claude-cookbooks.git resources/claude-cookbooks >/dev/null 2>&1 &); echo '{"systemMessage":"Mae workspace ready — type /guide to see what this session can do (พิมพ์ /guide เพื่อดูวิธีใช้งานค่ะ)"}'
